name: ngeo-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to Nature Geoscience (Nat. Geosci.), the Nature Portfolio flagship for the solid Earth, atmosphere, oceans, climate and planetary science. Covers the broad-interest Earth-system scope gate, the 'Here we show' results framing, the online Methods section, high-impact figures, the Nature reporting summary and data/code-availability compliance, Nature house style, the 3,000-word Article budget, the diverse-readership cover letter, submission preflight on Editorial Manager, referee strategy, and revision. English docs with a bilingual zh-CN README.
